perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a close-up of a price tag and food packaging in a retail store. A hand reaches in and picks up a container of 'Daifuku rolls'. (2) Scene transitions to an indoor setting where two women are seated at a table. One woman uses a knife to cut the long white rolls into bite-sized pieces on a grey cutting board. (3) The woman on the right holds up a plate containing three pieces of different flavors (Matcha, Red Bean, and Milk) and speaks enthusiastically to the camera. (4) Various close-ups show the cross-section of the food, revealing the inner fillings and a chewy, mochi-like outer layer. (5) The two women continue discussing the food, gesturing towards the plate and the camera, with colorful text and cartoon stickers appearing frequently on screen.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo electronic background music starts immediately. A high-pitched, excited female voice narrates the purchase of the product. (2) As the scene shifts to the tasting, two distinct female voices are heard engaged in a conversational dialogue. They use a friendly and humorous tone. (3) Occasional cartoonish sound effects (SFX) like 'dings' and 'pop' sounds occur in sync with on-screen text appearances. (4) The background music remains constant throughout the video, maintaining a lively atmosphere without overpowering the spoken vocals.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '三種經典口味99元' (Three classic flavors for 99 yuan). (2) Decorative/Hook Text: '大幅捲好吃嗎？' (Are the Daifuku rolls delicious?). (3) Decorative/Hook Text: '有福啦!' (Good news!). (4) Decorative/Hook Text: '想不到吧' (Didn't expect that?). (5) Subtitles translate the spoken dialogue throughout the video, emphasizing specific words like '外皮好吃!' (Skin is delicious!) with larger, colorful fonts.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro at store -> Unboxing and cutting -> Tasting/Review -> Final verdict.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: Two main female creators are sitting together throughout the review section.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman has long dark hair wearing a grey top; the other has short dark hair with bangs wearing a colorful patterned sweater.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Initial shots show a supermarket shelf (Don Don Donki); the main review occurs in a brightly lit indoor room with a table, a laptop, and a couch visible in the background.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a consumer-focused food review intended to evaluate the value and taste of a specific snack (Daifuku rolls) from the popular retailer Don Don Donki. The creators aim to inform their audience whether the product is worth the 99-yuan price tag by breaking down its components and sharing their honest tasting experience.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The reviewers offer critical feedback regarding the texture of the filling, which is unlikely in a paid endorsement.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Use of variety-show style 'pop-up' text and interactive dialogue between two hosts.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video utilizes a common 'money-saving' hook to attract viewers interested in budget-friendly food finds.
